faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about our services

q1.question: What documents are required for booking?
q1.answer: You need a valid driver's license, valid ID/residency, and a credit card for guarantee.

q2.question: Can I return the car in a different city?
q2.answer: Yes, we offer inter-city delivery service. Please contact us to arrange this with a small additional fee.

q3.question: What is the cancellation policy?
q3.answer: You can cancel 24 hours before pickup without charges. After that, cancellation fees may apply.

q4.question: Is insurance included?
q4.answer: Yes, all our cars are comprehensively insured. You can upgrade for broader coverage when booking.

q5.question: What is the minimum rental age?
q5.answer: The minimum age is 21 years with a valid driver's license for at least one year.

q6.question: Can I add an additional driver?
q6.answer: Yes, you can add an additional driver by providing their driver's license with a small extra fee.

q7.question: What should I do in case of accident or breakdown?
q7.answer: Call us immediately on the emergency number. Our team is available 24/7 to assist you and send a replacement car.

q8.question: Can I extend my rental period?
q8.answer: Yes, you can extend your rental period through the app or by contacting us before the original period ends.

q9.question: Car Condition Documentation
q9.answer: To ensure your peace of mind and protect your rights, we take a full comprehensive video of the car before handover, ensuring you are not held responsible for any pre-existing damages.

policy.cancelItem1: You can cancel booking 24 hours before pickup without fees.
policy.cancelItem2: Cancellation within less than 24 hours may incur a one-day fee (subject to rental company policy).
policy.exchangeItem1: Car can be exchanged in case of technical fault or specification mismatch.
policy.exchangeItem2: Exchange depends on availability of similar cars at the rental company.
policy.refundItem1: Refunds are processed to the original payment method.
policy.refundItem2: Bank refunds take 7-14 business days depending on bank procedures.
policy.exceptionsItem1: Remaining days value cannot be refunded if car is returned early (unless exceptionally approved).
policy.exceptionsItem2: Traffic violations during rental period are non-refundable and deducted from deposit.
policy.disclaimer: * All operations are primarily subject to the rental contract signed between customer and service provider.

privacy.identity_verification: The client agrees to provide the service provider with a valid copy of the national ID or residency permit and driving license, via the website or approved means, for eligibility verification and to complete the vehicle rental process in accordance with the regulations in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
